# Right PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 174.683 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.4759
  biquad b0=1.00057005351 b1=-1.99710582543 b2=0.996666302206 a1=-1.99710582543 a2=0.997236355719

  biquad b0=1.00052782938 b1=-1.99741599815 b2=0.996913230763 a1=-1.99741599815 a2=0.997441060145

  biquad b0=1.00171283676 b1=-1.99142451022 b2=0.989983255951 a1=-1.99142451022 a2=0.991696092713

  biquad b0=1.00942519853 b1=-1.94844527607 b2=0.944881028124 a1=-1.94844527607 a2=0.954306226654
